title: Array Technologies Inc (ARRY) Q1 2024 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Array Technologies came out with quarterly earnings of $0.13 per share, beating Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.09 per share, representing earnings surprise of 44.44%. Company posted revenues of $302.36 million for quarter ended March 2025, surpassing Zacks Consensus Estimate by 14.92%, compared to year-ago revenues of $153.4 million. Company recorded about $400 million in new business in Q1, boasting book-to-bill ratio over 2.5 times and $2.1 billion order book. Adjusted gross margins in Q1 were 38.3%, driven by one-time $4M benefit, with core adjusted gross margin of about 25%. Current consensus EPS estimate is $0.18 on $285.86 million in revenues for coming quarter and $0.61 on $1.09 billion in revenues for current fiscal year.
